transcript.content: ugh hey... what a morning. my coffee maker literally exploded and i ended up getting so late for my meeting, my stress levels are already through the roof. how's your day going?
You could go to a coffee maker and drink a coffee . You'll be fine .

haha if only it were that easy to just find a working one right now! but honestly, to distract myself from the absolute mess in my kitchen, i started watching that new show 'The Traitors' last night. have you seen it? the drama is so wild, it's literally keeping me alive today.
The Traitors ' Last night

haha yeah, it's so addicting. but ugh, the distraction only lasted so long... now i'm back to staring at the puddle on my kitchen floor and thinking about how bad i messed up my schedule today. my morning is officially ruined.
h
i'm fine
but seriously though why do you always reply with one letter or repeat what i say lol, are you secretly a traitor too? 
lol
haha see, total traitor behavior. but hey, since you're being mysterious, do you even remember why my morning was so ruined in the first place or have you already forgotten?
(no response generated)
haha come on, don't plead the fifth! did you actually forget about my exploded coffee maker and the giant puddle on my kitchen floor already?
They ...
"They" who? Are the Traitors coming for me now? Or are you just trying to avoid admitting that you totally forgot about my kitchen disaster?
. Is ok
". Is ok" ??? lol you are so cryptic today. is your system malfunctioning from all the drama or are you just trying to tell me to calm down about the coffee puddle?

"s ..." is that a snake hiss or are you trying to say sorry?? if you are trying to apologize for having the memory of a goldfish, it's fine lol. i cleaned up the mess anyway. now i just need a real coffee.
Ohs now

"Ohs now"?? lol i literally cannot with your replies today. are you trying to say 'oh, now you cleaned it up' or is 'Ohs' like... a new brand of cereal i should buy to replace my breakfast? please tell me you're at least functioning enough to recommend a good coffee spot nearby.
(no response generated)
hellooooo?? did the traitors get you? or did you pass out from the lack of coffee too? seriously, i need a lifeline here, my brain is at like 2% battery right now.
(no response generated)

okay i am officially pronouncing you dead. RIP to my virtual wellness buddy, taken too soon by... whatever glitch this is. i guess i'll just walk outside and hope i stumble into a starbucks by sheer luck. wish me luck!
omg wait, a ghost! you're alive! or... wait, is this your ghost typing? quick, blink once if you're okay and twice if you still have absolutely no idea what i'm talking about.
(no response generated)

and the silence continues... yep, definitely a ghost. well, ghost buddy, i'm officially heading out into the cold, cruel, caffeineless world. if i get lost, please haunt a starbucks and flicker the lights to guide me. peace out!
please
